validation_intent: Define intended use, tissue types, storage limits, and custody requirements.
technical_expression: Define intended use, tissue categories, storage limits, and custody expectations for human tissue.
plain_language_expression: Describe what tissue is stored, how long, and under what restrictions.
trace_notes: Sets the scope for all validation.

validation_intent: Verify installation location, airflow, ambient conditions, and environmental suitability.
technical_expression: Verify installation, airflow, ambient temperature, clearance, and environmental suitability.
plain_language_expression: Confirm the fridge is installed in a suitable environment.

validation_intent: Ensure temperature probes and data loggers are calibrated and traceable.
technical_expression: Ensure temperature probes and loggers are calibrated and traceable.
plain_language_expression: Make sure the sensors used to protect tissue are accurate.

validation_intent: Ensure alarm thresholds, delays, and notification routing are defined and verified.
technical_expression: Define alarm thresholds, delays, escalation paths, and notification routing.
plain_language_expression: Define how alarms work and who gets notified.

validation_intent: Ensure access control and chain-of-custody procedures are defined.
technical_expression: Define access control, authorized handlers, and custody procedures.
plain_language_expression: Define who can access tissue and how custody is tracked.

validation_intent: Ensure SOPs for loading, segregation, cleaning, and response are defined.
technical_expression: Define SOPs for loading, segregation, cleaning, and alarm response.
plain_language_expression: Define how tissue is handled safely.

validation_intent: Ensure handlers are trained and authorized.
technical_expression: Ensure personnel are trained and authorized for tissue handling.
plain_language_expression: Ensure only trained people handle tissue.

validation_intent: Ensure the refrigerator maintains required temperature conditions throughout the usable volume.
technical_expression: Perform temperature mapping to demonstrate compliance across the usable storage volume.
plain_language_expression: Prove the whole fridge stays in range, not just near the probe.

validation_intent: Ensure door-open and recovery behavior is challenged.
technical_expression: Challenge door-open and recovery behavior to ensure tissue remains protected.
plain_language_expression: Test how quickly the fridge recovers after being opened.

validation_intent: Ensure alarms function correctly under challenge conditions.
technical_expression: Verify alarm thresholds, delays, and escalation paths under challenge conditions.
plain_language_expression: Prove alarms work when they should.

validation_intent: Ensure data logging integrity and review controls are defined.
technical_expression: Define data logging intervals, retention, review frequency, and audit trail expectations.
plain_language_expression: Define how temperature data is reviewed and protected.

validation_intent: Define acceptance criteria for excursions and recovery.
technical_expression: Define measurable acceptance criteria for excursions, recovery times, and allowable deviations.
plain_language_expression: Set clear pass/fail rules for tissue safety.

validation_intent: Ensure routine monitoring and review plan is defined.
technical_expression: Define routine monitoring frequency, review expectations, and trending requirements.

validation_intent: Ensure excursions trigger documented investigation and disposition.
technical_expression: Define how excursions are investigated, assessed, and dispositioned.
plain_language_expression: Define what happens when temperature goes out of range.

validation_intent: Ensure chain-of-custody is verified during routine use.
technical_expression: Verify custody events, authorized handlers, and access logs.
plain_language_expression: Verify who accessed tissue and when.

validation_intent: Ensure maintenance and calibration support ongoing performance.
technical_expression: Define maintenance and calibration schedules and their linkage to requalification.
plain_language_expression: Define how maintenance supports tissue safety.

validation_intent: Ensure changes trigger impact assessment and requalification.
technical_expression: Define change categories and criteria for requalification.

validation_intent: Ensure periodic requalification frequency and scope are defined.
technical_expression: Define periodic requalification frequency, scope, and acceptance criteria.
plain_language_expression: Set a schedule for re-checking performance.
